text_preview: This website uses cookies We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services. Be informed that some of the cookies may transfer information to countries outside EU that may have different privacy standards. Consent Selection Necessary Preferences Statistics Marketing Show details Allow all cookies Allow selection Use necessary cookies only Why HTB Platform Plans Resources Company Business Sign in Get Started Build and scale a cyber workforce in the AI era Equip threat-ready cyber teams for an AI-accelerated landscape with hands-on labs, assessments, and pathways that build top performing teams. Upgrade your team's readiness Validate Your Readiness Develop Your Workforce Achieve Cyber Resilience Emulate Real Threats. Validate Readiness. Validate cybersecurity capabilities and operational readiness against real-world threats by replicating adversarial behaviors or attacks in threat emulation programs, so your teams are confident, capable, and prepared from day zero. Enterprise attack simulation training Real-world attack simulations and live-fire team exercises. Purple-minded scenarios Replicate complex multi-stage threats because modern breaches exploit entire networks. Break the mold of traditional training Real-time, hands-on, offensive & defensive content releases on latest vectors and vulnerabilities. Get hands-on readiness Cybersecurity skills proven in practice New to cyber, seasoned pro, or leading a national program, get hands-on training and exercises that keep people sharp, teams ready, and missions resilient. For Individuals Learn, refine and master your cyber skills Begin your journey For Businesses Build and scale threat-ready enterprise cyber teams Scale your team For Governments Cyber career development designed specifically for the public sector Learn more LATEST PRODUCT NEWS Hack The Box launches the world's first AI Range The world’s first controlled AI cyber range built to test and benchmark the safety, limits and capabilities of autonomous AI security agents. HTB AI Range replicates live, high-stakes cyber battlegrounds, tailored for enterprise readiness, where AI agents and human operators are evaluated side-by-side. Every model and every human is tested, refined and retested until mastery is measurable. Learn more Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Cybersecurity Skills And Training Platforms Hack The Box has been recognized as a leader in The Forrester Wave™: Cybersecurity Skills And Training Platforms, Q4 2023. Discover why we’re named a leader Hack The Box Acquires LetsDefend: Shaping the future of cyber readiness Learn more Hack The Box and Google partner to lead the future of AI security education Learn more Solutions for all cybersecurity domains Build a high-performing SOC with hands-on simulations, continuous measurement, and content mapped to MITRE & NIST. Blue Teams Red Teams Purple Teams AI Agents Make defenders your strongest control Build a high-performing SOC with hands-on simulations, continuous measurement, and content mapped to MITRE & NIST. ✓ SOC Readiness Plans: Training plans covering monitoring, triage, escalation, and critical tooling. ✓ Response Simulation: DFIR labs to rehearse end-to-end breach response and forensic analysis. ✓ Threat intel paths: Emulate TTPs, tune detections, and improve hunts. ✓ Instant Team assessments: Spin up prebuilt or custom defensive CTFs (180+ scenarios) in minutes. Live demo 4.3m+ learners Chat about labs, share resources and jobs. Connect with 200k+ hackers from all over the world. Join Discord 4.8 Rating by G2 users Get a full demo with our team Fill the form to schedule a live product demo and Q&A about our cyber readiness solutions.
